world_structure.description: World structure and spatial data: area metadata and retrieval, area player and immortal counting, room properties (sector type, healing/mana rate, guild, ownership, name), exit topology (direction names, reverse direction, keywords, keys), room and location identity encoding, worldmap coordinate system and quadtree-based spatial lookups, calendar and time-of-day data, sector type lookup, vnum identity, mobile prototype retrieval, mobile creation and cloning, skill-quest room selection.
world_structure.target_surfaces: room/exit typeclasses + prototypes + world Scripts (weather, time, resets)
